attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
STG.CDB_DEQUEUE_TIME,
STG.CREATION_DATE   ,              
STG.DEBIT_CREDIT_CODE    ,         
STG.ETL_PROCESS_DTM , 
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE,             
STG.GLOBAL_NAME  ,                 
STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,              
STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG,
STG.OTM_TERR_ID,                   
STG.OTM_TERR_NAME,                 
STG.OTM_TERR_TYPE_CODE,                 
STG.POS_TRANS_ID  ,
STG.REBOK_CHANNEL_FLAG,                
STG.SALESREP_NUMBER  ,             
STG.SC_ASSIGNMENT_MODE_CODE,
STG.SC_LAST_UPD_DATE,
STG.SC_REASON_CODE,       
STG.SC_SPLIT_PERCENT,            
STG.SC_TYPE_CODE,
STG.SC_UNALLOCATED,                
STG.SC_USAGE_CODE,                  
STG.SHR_NODE_ID,            
STG.TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE  ,         
STG.TRX_SC_ID,                  
STG.TRX_SOURCE_TYPE ,              
STG.USER_NAME  ,                   
STG.WIPS_COST_PRICE  ,             
STG.WIPS_LIST_PRICE ,              
STG.WIPS_UNIT_PRICE,
STG.SK3_SC_ID_INT,			 /*  ADDED  AS PART OF  IDE RETIREMENT */
CAST (STG.LAST_UPDATED_DTM AS TIMESTAMP(0)),			 /*  ADDED  AS PART OF  IDE RETIREMENT */
STG.DV_LAST_UPDATED_DT,			 /*  ADDED  AS PART OF  IDE RETIREMENT */
STG.LATEST_SALES_CREDIT_FLG,		 /*  ADDED  AS PART OF  IDE RETIREMENT */
STG.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,			 /*  ADDED  AS PART OF  IDE RETIREMENT */
STG.SALES_CREDIT_DUPLICATE_FLG,		 /*  ADDED  AS PART OF  IDE RETIREMENT */
STG.TRX_VERSION_CHANGE_FLG,
STG.DISTRIBUTOR_BUCKET_FLG,
STG.START_DATE,
STG.EXPIRATION_DATE,
STG.UCRM_CASE_NUM
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_OTM_SLS_CRDTS_POS_DR  STG
WHERE NOT EXISTS 
( SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_POS_SCA_ADJ_CHNG_DIRECT  WK
WHERE WK.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT=STG.TRX_SC_ID )
AND STG.TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE='DR'

SELECT 
SM.POS_SCAAC_KEY AS POS_SCAAC_KEY,
'=' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG,
STG.SC_ASSIGNMENT_MODE_CODE AS PD_ASSIGNMENT_MODE_CD,
STG.WIPS_LIST_PRICE * STG.SC_SPLIT_PERCENT AS EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT,
STG.WIPS_COST_PRICE * STG.SC_SPLIT_PERCENT AS EXTENDED_COST_PRICE_USD_AMT,
NESR.SALES_REP_NUMBER  AS PD_SALES_REP_NUM,
STG.WIPS_UNIT_PRICE * STG.SC_SPLIT_PERCENT AS EXTENDED_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT,
NSTT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  AS PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
CASE WHEN STG.TRX_SOURCE_TYPE IN ('OFFSET','DSV_POS_OFFSET') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG,
NPTL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT  AS PD_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
NSCT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE  AS  PD_BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
NULL AS SK_NET_CHANGE_CREDITS_ID_INT,
STG.CREATION_DATE  AS   PD_TRANSACTION_DT,
(STG.SC_SPLIT_PERCENT*100)  AS  PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,
STG.TRX_SC_ID   AS      SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT,
'QTC'      AS      PD_SS_CD,
STG.CREATION_DATE  AS PD_ADJUSTMENT_DT,
STG.SC_LAST_UPD_DATE  AS PD_SLS_CREDIT_LAST_UPDATE_DTM,
NEU.ERP_USER_NAME  AS PD_CREATED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
STG.REBOK_CHANNEL_FLAG AS REBOK_CHANNEL_FLG ,
STG.OTM_TERR_ID AS SRC_RPTD_REBOK_OTM_TERR_ID_INT,
STG.SC_USAGE_CODE AS PD_SALES_CREDIT_USAGE_CD,  
STG.OTM_TERR_NAME AS SRC_RPTD_REBOK_OTM_TERR_NAME, 
STG.SC_UNALLOCATED AS PD_SLS_CREDIT_UNALLOCATED_FLG, 
STG.OTM_TERR_TYPE_CODE AS SRC_RPTD_REBOK_OTM_TERR_TYP_CD,
NSCAR.BK_SLS_CRDT_ASGNMNT_REASON_CD AS BK_SLS_CRDT_ASGNMNT_REASON_CD,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,              
USER EDW_CREATE_USER,               
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DTM,              
USER EDW_UPDATE_USER,
STG.CREATION_DATE      AS      START_TV_DTM,
(CASE
WHEN STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG='N' AND STG.CREATION_DATE<>STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE THEN COALESCE((STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE- INTERVAL '1' SECOND),CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))
WHEN STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG='N' AND STG.CREATION_DATE=STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE THEN COALESCE(STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))
WHEN STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG='Y' AND STG.DEBIT_CREDIT_CODE='DEBIT' THEN COALESCE((STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE- INTERVAL '1' SECOND),CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))
WHEN STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG='Y' THEN CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0) )
END)  AS END_TV_DTM,
COALESCE(STG.SK3_SC_ID_INT,-999),	          /*  ADDED  AS PART OF  IDE RETIREMENT */		
COALESCE(STG.LAST_UPDATED_DTM,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))),                     /*  ADDED  AS PART OF  IDE RETIREMENT */
COALESCE(STG.DV_LAST_UPDATED_DT,CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)),                   /*  ADDED  AS PART OF  IDE RETIREMENT */
COALESCE(STG.LATEST_SALES_CREDIT_FLG,'N'),              /*  ADDED  AS PART OF  IDE RETIREMENT */
COALESCE(STG.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,'N'),                   /*  ADDED  AS PART OF  IDE RETIREMENT */
COALESCE(STG.SALES_CREDIT_DUPLICATE_FLG,'N'),            /*  ADDED  AS PART OF  IDE RETIREMENT */
STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG AS      ACTION_CODE,
CASE
WHEN STG.DEBIT_CREDIT_CODE ='CREDIT' THEN 'I'
WHEN STG.DEBIT_CREDIT_CODE ='DEBIT' THEN 'U'
END AS DML_TYPE,
COALESCE(TRX_VERSION_CHANGE_FLG,'N') AS TRX_VERSION_CHANGE_FLG,
COALESCE(DISTRIBUTOR_BUCKET_FLG,'N'),
START_DATE AS START_DATE,
CAST(START_DATE AS DATE) AS DV_START_DT,
EXPIRATION_DATE AS EXPIRATION_DATE,
CAST(EXPIRATION_DATE AS DATE) AS DV_EXPIRATION_DT,
STG.UCRM_CASE_NUM
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_OTM_SLS_CRDTS_POS_DR  STG
INNER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE NPTL
ON STG.POS_TRANS_ID = NPTL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_TV NSCT
ON STG.SC_TYPE_CODE = NSCT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
AND NSCT.END_TV_DATE ='3500-01-01'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_SALES_REP_TV NESR
ON STG.SALESREP_NUMBER =CAST(CAST(COALESCE(NULLIF(NESR.SALES_REP_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN'),-999) AS INTEGER) AS VARCHAR(30))
AND NESR.END_TV_DATE ='3500-01-01'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_USER NEU
ON STG.USER_NAME = NEU.ERP_USER_NAME
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY_TV NSTT
ON STG.SHR_NODE_ID = NSTT.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT
AND NSTT.END_TV_DATE ='3500-01-01'
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_POS_SCA_ADJ_CHNG_OVERLAY  SM
ON SM.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT = STG.TRX_SC_ID
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_ASGNMNT_REASON NSCAR
ON
STG.SC_REASON_CODE=NSCAR.BK_SLS_CRDT_ASGNMNT_REASON_CD
WHERE STG.TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE = 'DR'

UNION

SELECT 
SM.POS_SCAAC_KEY AS POS_SCAAC_KEY,
'=' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG,
STG.SC_ASSIGNMENT_MODE_CODE AS PD_ASSIGNMENT_MODE_CD,
STG.WIPS_LIST_PRICE * STG.SC_SPLIT_PERCENT AS EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT,
STG.WIPS_COST_PRICE * STG.SC_SPLIT_PERCENT AS EXTENDED_COST_PRICE_USD_AMT,
NESR.SALES_REP_NUMBER  AS PD_SALES_REP_NUM,
STG.WIPS_UNIT_PRICE * STG.SC_SPLIT_PERCENT AS EXTENDED_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT,
NSTT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  AS PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
CASE WHEN STG.TRX_SOURCE_TYPE ='DSV_BKG_OFFSET' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG,
NPTL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT  AS PD_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
NSCT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE  AS  PD_BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
NULL AS SK_NET_CHANGE_CREDITS_ID_INT,
STG.CREATION_DATE  AS   PD_TRANSACTION_DT,
(STG.SC_SPLIT_PERCENT*100)  AS  PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,
STG.TRX_SC_ID   AS      SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT,
'QTC'      AS      PD_SS_CD,
STG.CREATION_DATE  AS PD_ADJUSTMENT_DT,
STG.SC_LAST_UPD_DATE  AS PD_SLS_CREDIT_LAST_UPDATE_DTM,
NEU.ERP_USER_NAME  AS PD_CREATED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
STG.REBOK_CHANNEL_FLAG AS REBOK_CHANNEL_FLG ,
STG.OTM_TERR_ID AS SRC_RPTD_REBOK_OTM_TERR_ID_INT,
STG.SC_USAGE_CODE AS PD_SALES_CREDIT_USAGE_CD,  
STG.OTM_TERR_NAME AS SRC_RPTD_REBOK_OTM_TERR_NAME, 
STG.SC_UNALLOCATED AS PD_SLS_CREDIT_UNALLOCATED_FLG, 
STG.OTM_TERR_TYPE_CODE AS SRC_RPTD_REBOK_OTM_TERR_TYP_CD,
NSCAR.BK_SLS_CRDT_ASGNMNT_REASON_CD AS BK_SLS_CRDT_ASGNMNT_REASON_CD,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,              
USER EDW_CREATE_USER,               
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DTM,              
USER EDW_UPDATE_USER,
STG.CREATION_DATE      AS      START_TV_DTM,
(CASE
WHEN STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG='N' AND STG.CREATION_DATE<>STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE THEN COALESCE((STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE- INTERVAL '1' SECOND),CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))
WHEN STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG='N' AND STG.CREATION_DATE=STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE THEN COALESCE(STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))
WHEN STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG='Y' AND STG.DEBIT_CREDIT_CODE='DEBIT' THEN COALESCE((STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE- INTERVAL '1' SECOND),CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))
WHEN STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG='Y' THEN CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0) )
END)  AS END_TV_DTM,
COALESCE(STG.SK3_SC_ID_INT,-999),	          /*  ADDED  AS PART OF  IDE RETIREMENT */		
COALESCE(STG.LAST_UPDATED_DTM,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))),                     /*  ADDED  AS PART OF  IDE RETIREMENT */
COALESCE(STG.DV_LAST_UPDATED_DT,CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)),                   /*  ADDED  AS PART OF  IDE RETIREMENT */
COALESCE(STG.LATEST_SALES_CREDIT_FLG,'N'),              /*  ADDED  AS PART OF  IDE RETIREMENT */
COALESCE(STG.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,'N'),                   /*  ADDED  AS PART OF  IDE RETIREMENT */
COALESCE(STG.SALES_CREDIT_DUPLICATE_FLG,'N'),            /*  ADDED  AS PART OF  IDE RETIREMENT */
STG.LATEST_SC_FLAG AS      ACTION_CODE,
CASE
WHEN STG.DEBIT_CREDIT_CODE ='CREDIT' THEN 'I'
WHEN STG.DEBIT_CREDIT_CODE ='DEBIT' THEN 'U'
END AS DML_TYPE,
COALESCE(TRX_VERSION_CHANGE_FLG,'N') AS TRX_VERSION_CHANGE_FLG,
COALESCE(DISTRIBUTOR_BUCKET_FLG,'N'),
START_DATE AS START_DATE,
CAST(START_DATE AS DATE) AS DV_START_DT,
EXPIRATION_DATE AS EXPIRATION_DATE,
CAST(EXPIRATION_DATE AS DATE) AS DV_EXPIRATION_DT,
STG.UCRM_CASE_NUM
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_OTM_SLS_CRDTS_POS_DR  STG
INNER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKG_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE NPTL
ON STG.POS_TRANS_ID = NPTL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_TV NSCT
ON STG.SC_TYPE_CODE = NSCT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
AND NSCT.END_TV_DATE ='3500-01-01'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_SALES_REP_TV NESR
ON STG.SALESREP_NUMBER =CAST(CAST(COALESCE(NULLIF(NESR.SALES_REP_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN'),-999) AS INTEGER) AS VARCHAR(30))
AND NESR.END_TV_DATE ='3500-01-01'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_USER NEU
ON STG.USER_NAME = NEU.ERP_USER_NAME
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY_TV NSTT
ON STG.SHR_NODE_ID = NSTT.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT
AND NSTT.END_TV_DATE ='3500-01-01'
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_POS_SCA_ADJ_CHNG_OVERLAY  SM
ON SM.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT = STG.TRX_SC_ID
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_ASGNMNT_REASON NSCAR
ON
STG.SC_REASON_CODE=NSCAR.BK_SLS_CRDT_ASGNMNT_REASON_CD
WHERE STG.TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE = 'DR'

SELECT
EX.CDB_DEQUEUE_TIME,
EX.CREATION_DATE   ,              
EX.DEBIT_CREDIT_CODE    ,         
EX.ETL_PROCESS_DTM ,              
EX.GLOBAL_NAME  ,                 
EX.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,              
EX.LATEST_SC_FLAG,
EX.OTM_TERR_ID,                   
EX.OTM_TERR_NAME,                 
EX.OTM_TERR_TYPE_CODE,                
EX.POS_TRANS_ID, 
EX.REBOK_CHANNEL_FLAG,               
EX.SALESREP_NUMBER,             
EX.SC_ASSIGNMENT_MODE_CODE,
EX.SC_LAST_UPD_DATE,
EX.SC_REASON_CODE,       
EX.SC_SPLIT_PERCENT,            
EX.SC_TYPE_CODE,
EX.SC_UNALLOCATED,                
EX.SC_USAGE_CODE,                  
EX.SHR_NODE_ID,               
EX.TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE,         
EX.TRX_SC_ID,                  
EX.TRX_SOURCE_TYPE,              
EX.USER_NAME,                   
EX.WIPS_COST_PRICE  ,             
EX.WIPS_LIST_PRICE ,              
EX.WIPS_UNIT_PRICE,
EX.SK3_SC_ID_INT,                 
EX.LAST_UPDATED_DTM,              
EX.DV_LAST_UPDATED_DT,            
EX.LATEST_SALES_CREDIT_FLG,       
EX.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,            
EX.SALES_CREDIT_DUPLICATE_FLG,    
EX.TRX_VERSION_CHANGE_FLG,        
EX.DISTRIBUTOR_BUCKET_FLG  ,
EX.START_DATE,
EX.EXPIRATION_DATE,
EX.UCRM_CASE_NUM
FROM   
$$EXCEPDB.EX_OTM_SLS_CRDTS_POS_DR  EX
WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM  $$STGDB.ST_OTM_SLS_CRDTS_POS_DR  STG
WHERE EX.TRX_SC_ID=STG.TRX_SC_ID)
